title: Expansion of mouse embryonic fibroblasts (MEFs) for hPSC cultures
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"afhbg","text":"This protocol describes the expansion of mouse embryonic fibroblasts (MEFs) as feeder cells for human pluripotent stem cell (hPSC) culture.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d8mpv","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6eiht","text":"General notes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7ibtv","text":"1. Throughout this protocol, the term hPSC is used to collectively refer to both hiPSCs and hESCs. All described procedures have been tested and work equally well for hiPSCs and hESCs.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7tjl2","text":"2. steps: Wash the plates twice with DPBS
Add Trypsin and incubate for 00:05:00 (37°C; 5% CO2)
Add MEF medium to neutralize the Trypsin and collect the solution into a conical tube.
Remove the supernatant. Re-suspend the cell pellet in fresh MEF medium to plate on gelatin-coated plates (Dilution ratio 1:4) and maintain in a humidified incubator (37°C; 5% CO2).

MEFs need to be passaged once confluent (every 3-4 days) and can be expanded up to passage 4 (P4) and frozen before or after inactivation using irradiation or Mitomycin C treatment. For more information on freezing MEFs, as well as irradiation and Mitomycin C treatment of MEFs, refer to the collection "Maintenance and inactivation of mouse embryonic fibroblasts (MEFs) as feeder cells for human pluripotent stem cell culture." A link to this collection can be found in the title section of this protocol, located above

MEF medium A B 1 DMEM 435 ml 2 FB Essence/FBS* 75 ml 3 200mM L-Glutamine 5 ml 4 Penicillin & Streptomycin (100x) 5 ml 5 MEM Non-Essential Amino Acids 5 ml *We have successfully used either FB Essence or FBS and have not observed an obvious difference. Final volume: 500ml
creator: Hanqin Li
